label: JCMT · CO line cube
tip: 61×61×3872 — high-resolution spectral line cube. One compact emission source in a noise sea: try the volume view first.

label: JWST MIRI MRS · IFU
tip: 43×45×4404 — table-based wavelengths (WAVE-TAB), ~58% NaN border. Good NaN-handling showcase.

label: JWST NIRSpec · IFU
tip: 51×49×972 — compact target, fastest sample. Pin a spectrum and scrub the emission lines.

label: JWST NIRSpec · lamp cal
tip: 30×37×3610 — internal lamp exposure with no sky WCS: probe falls back to pixel coordinates.
